field.label: Enable VPN Link
field.help:
WireGuard VPN clients will behave exactly like devices on the selected LAN.
Automatically configures NAT, DNS access, and inherits all firewall routing rules.

field.label: Mirror LAN
field.help:
Which LAN should VPN clients mirror? Enter the OPNsense interface name (e.g. "opt1" for LAN2).
VPN client traffic will be masqueraded as this LAN's IP, inheriting all its firewall rules, DNS settings, and gateway routing policies.
